claim_text: A jointly learned budget controller improves the quality-cost Pareto frontier over the strongest eligible baseline.
notes: Must remain a hypothesis until confirmatory evidence exists

claim_text: The joint allocation across bounded workspace, versioned episodic memory, compressed state, recurrent compute, verification, and halting is technically distinct from prior work.
notes: M1 rejects both the broad component claim and the narrow policy-object claim

claim_text: Lossless storage of selected episodic payloads does not imply exact retrieval or bounded infinite storage.
notes: Logical scope restriction; not an empirical result

claim_text: Exact Sol, Terra, and Luna model selection is not exposed by the current runtime.
notes: Functional roles are used as fallbacks

claim_text: The individual components and most pairwise memory-compute combinations in the broad candidate are disclosed in prior work.
notes: M1 adds direct unified-policy and learned-update-and-halt anticipation

claim_text: One non-factorizing constrained policy over mutable versioned episodic I/O, compressed state, recurrent compute, verification, and halting improves same-component fixed and separated controls.
notes: Empirical superiority was not tested; the policy-class novelty portion is rejected and unified-versus-decoupled training is directly anticipated

claim_text: Complete physical accounting changes an architecture ranking or establishes a stable new resource-allocation law.
notes: No candidate result or new law exists; recent multi-system work already studies lifecycle costs and workload-dependent trade-offs

claim_text: The broad or narrowed candidate architecture is currently eligible as an original architecture paper.
notes: Current architecture and empirical routes are NOT_ELIGIBLE after M1

claim_text: A direction-setting transition framework for future stateful LLM systems is original and article-eligible.
notes: M1b returns STOP: the direction and strongest composite are anticipated and no predictive residual is distinct

claim_text: WAIN-Core or Joint Memory Machine is currently an original component-agnostic benchmark contribution.
notes: Temporal operations and bounded noisy retention are covered and JMM encodes the candidate component ontology

claim_text: The implementation-neutral objects Omega, G, B, Adeq, Cert, Cmp, T*, and T_hat constitute a distinct formal theory for LLM transitions.
notes: Assume-guarantee and QoS contracts, vector resources, temporal provenance, caching, value of computation, Pareto selection, evidence certification, and reject decisions reconstruct the ideal shell; no calibrated LLM-specific estimator is supplied

claim_text: A validity-before-compute rule is currently a distinct and transportable LLM-specific boundary law.
notes: The direction follows from state adequacy plus conditional value of computation; an exact cross-family coefficient is unsupported rather than distinct

claim_text: The five M1b prediction candidates justify a GO or PIVOT article route.
notes: Every registered prediction is anticipated or generic; the remaining quantitative claims are unspecified and no DISTINCT_CANDIDATE survives

claim_text: At least one of the sixteen independently motivated M1c technical objects survives direct prior art, strongest-composite comparison, and generic-theory reduction.
owner: Sol-PI / formal, systems, dynamics, distinctness, and minimum-design review lanes
notes: Zero DISTINCT_CANDIDATE objects survive; exact LLM application cells for hysteresis and reset-to-stream reversal are not directly reported but are anticipated by positive composites that already supply the protocol ingredients, phenomenon classes, and ordinary estimators

claim_text: Reset-per-episode evaluation and persistent-stream evaluation define a currently distinct agent-memory observable when their system rankings reverse.
notes: No examined record reports the exact reset-to-stream inversion; Artifact Ecology anticipates inheritance conditions, ShiftBench anticipates longitudinal selection inversions, MemDelta anticipates controlled conclusion reversals, and time-series causal estimands reconstruct the path contrast, while the earlier longitudinal and shared-state records supply order, cross-episode, and fair-comparison controls; the residual is ANTICIPATED_BY_COMPOSITE rather than ANTICIPATED_DIRECTLY

claim_text: At least one of the 24 M1d state-compute candidates survives direct prior art, strongest-composite comparison, generic-theory reduction, the no-recycling boundary, and an identified factorized comparator.
owner: Sol-PI / formal, learning, runtime, bibliographic, and contradictory review lanes
notes: Zero DISTINCT_CANDIDATE objects survive after one direct anticipation, six positive composites, nine conditional reductions, two unsupported non-distinct objects, and six scope exclusions

claim_text: At fixed history, an unrestricted sequential manager-router interface can reproduce the behavioral joint distribution pi(m,c|h) as pi_M(m|h) times pi_C(c|h,m).
notes: This conditional-probability factorization assumes unrestricted information passage and says nothing by itself about causal order, computational cost, latency, learning, optimization, or sample efficiency. Behavioral separation requires a preregistered intrinsic restriction; other claim types need their own matched estimand or bound

claim_text: The M1d candidate set currently establishes an original direction-setting article route for governed persistent state and adaptive compute.
notes: Proposed Decision 0006 returns STOP. Interactions, useful mechanisms, and exact application cells do not supply a distinct law, estimator, invariant, bound, theorem, or identified separation

claim_text: At least one of the 24 M1e screened formulations survives direct prior art, strongest-composite comparison, generic-theory reduction, restricted-class matching, label substitution, the no-recycling boundary, and the admission-format gate.
owner: Sol-PI / communication causal learning bibliographic and contradictory review lanes
notes: Zero DISTINCT_CANDIDATE objects survive: 9 direct anticipations 1 positive composite 9 generic reductions 3 scope violations and 2 unsupported non-distinct admission failures

claim_text: A matched factorized M1e comparator may be jointly designed and trained and may use the same allowed observations randomness transcript rounds state parameters samples probes passes oracle calls feedback and compute as the candidate.
notes: This is the preregistered comparison class rather than an empirical result; weakening module training information or resources cannot establish intrinsic non-factorization

claim_text: The M1e restricted-class candidate set currently establishes an original direction-setting article route for governed persistent state and adaptive computation.
notes: Decision 0007 is accepted as STOP. None of the admitted restricted communication causal or learning classes yields a distinct theorem estimand parameter invariant or phase law; C10 and C23 fail admission rather than establish one

claim_text: The recovered report's tokenisation-by-mission pipeline establishes a distinct lexical state-compute mechanism rather than an assembly of domain vocabulary adaptation item tokenization model routing and serving optimization.
notes: UniTok tokenizes recommender items rather than text; reversible codecs transcode exactly; the remaining components are independent prior objects evaluated under incompatible tasks and accounting regimes

claim_text: At least one of the nine sequential M1f mechanism-first objects survives the 64-object crosswalk direct prior art strongest matched comparator generic reduction label substitution exact compiler and admission-format gate.
owner: Sol-PI / formal systems security report and reduction review lanes
notes: Zero objects are admitted; every attempt recycles an earlier object collides directly reduces to a generic class or is falsified by an exact compiler or transcode

claim_text: A joint controller with common input and randomness has a superconstant work or depth advantage over every co-designed two-module factorization producing the same two outputs.
notes: Two parallel copies reproduce the exact joint law with at most twice the work the same depth and zero message; a single copy plus one output message gives a second compiler; stronger gaps require generic communication or pebbling restrictions

claim_text: The M1f object set and recovered report currently establish an original direction-setting article route for governed persistent state and adaptive computation.
notes: Proposed Decision 0008 returns STOP; neither a report synthesis nor any of the nine fixed mechanisms supplies a distinct theorem estimand invariant capability or law

claim_text: The upstream report referenced by the original research-program attachment is now available with fixed local provenance and has been read in full.
notes: The report is a 23-page 517191-byte local PDF fixed by SHA-256; availability does not validate its scientific claims
